checks.desc: billing list page includes the specified case, customer, group, receivable, received, outstanding, next-node, and payment-status fields
default filters for payment status, group, and owner are available
the module exposes billing-plan and payment-record sections with the specified fields
authorized users can register payments and upload vouchers linked to PaymentRecord
authorized users can create collection tasks for overdue billing nodes
arrears-risk confirmation records confirmer and reason before unpaid submission continues
overdue and settled states are visibly represented in the module
P0 behavior remains limited to manual payment logging and internal risk handling without invoices, reports, auto-reconciliation, customer-facing reminders, or step-level hard billing blocks
